title: DecisionRecord
description: Layer 7 output — the completed decision record written to data/journal/

date.description: Decision date YYYY-MM-DD — used in journal filename

philosophy_fit_notes.description: Rationale for philosophy_fit, especially used when the Chief Analyst reclassifies the screened archetype.

entry_price.description: Python-computed entry price per share (the price at which the modeled reward/risk meets the 2:1 threshold). Sourced from synthesis.computed_entry. Null if case_label is INVERTED or DEGENERATE, or if recommendation is 'blocked'.

entry_range.description: Python-computed acceptable entry band. {low, high} object. Null under the same conditions as entry_price.

entry_price_rationale.description: Chief Analyst's rationale prose if present (referencing case_label, gate, and matrix outcome); otherwise the calculator's one-line rationale. Chief no longer restates the calculator's arithmetic.

current_price_used.description: Absolute current price the calculator anchored against, sourced from price_data.current_price. For auditability.

entry_price_case.description: Calculator case label. Drives the gate axis of the Chief's recommendation matrix.

ratio_at_current.description: Reward/risk at current price: (bull_scenario - current) / (current - bear_scenario). Null when undefined (current at/outside the bear-bull interval).

price_gate_passed.description: Whether ratio_at_current ≥ archetype_min_rr. The price-discipline axis of the recommendation matrix. Null if archetype unrecognized or ratio undefined.

archetype_min_rr.description: Minimum reward/risk at current price for the entry to clear the gate. deep_value 2.0, quality_compounder 1.5, long_term_compounder 1.2. Null if archetype unrecognized.

target_2to1_price.description: The 2:1 reward/risk entry price X = (bull + 2*bear)/3. Reference number; the entry recommendation already accounts for this via case_label and entry_range.

merit_lean.description: Debate Moderator's verdict — the Chief's merit-lean anchor. Null when the Moderator failed to parse (debate inconclusive).

merit_margin.description: Signed Moderator margin on normalised-to-10 scale (positive = bull). Drives the margin-scaled winner/loser weighting in compute_debate_scores.

decisive_evidence.description: Single most decisive item the Moderator named for the leaning side. Empty when balanced or when Moderator failed.

learning_hooks.description: Bull + bear learning hooks persisted for 90/180/365-day outcome tracking

action.description: What the investor actually decided to do

position_size_pct.description: Position size as % of portfolio (null if action is watch/pass)

override_recommendation.description: Investor's actual decision when overriding the analyst
